sources.cleaned_content:
# Q²M LEATHERSET NATURAL

## Interior / maintenance

### Complete leather maintenance set for well maintained leather.

Q²M LeatherSet Natural is a complete solution for maintaining and protecting modern automotive leather. It combines Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural with Q² LeatherCoat REDEFINED to deliver effective cleaning and long-lasting protection in one set, with all the necessary accessories to complete the job in one go.

![Product image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_leather-cleaner-natural_box_2023-1-1024x991.png)

## Complete leather maintenance set for well maintained leather.

Q²M LeatherSet Natural simplifies leather care by pairing gentle cleaning with durable protection. It removes light dirt and oily residue, prepares the surface correctly and applies a protective layer that helps preserve the original look and feel of leather upholstery.

- PERFECT FOR DAILY USE
- SAFE ON ALL TYPES OF LEATHER
- MILD CLEANING ACTION

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![Product image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mleathersetnatural.webp)

BOX CONTAINS: Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural 200ml / Q² LeatherCoat Redefined 120ml / Q²M ScrubPad EVO / Q²M MF Applicator / Microfibre

Consumption: 1set / 2-3 cars

## HOW TO USE

01. Clean the leather using Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural and the included tools.
02. Wipe away residue to leave a clean, matte surface.
03. Apply Q² LeatherCoat REDEFINED evenly to the leather.
04. Allow the product to bond to the surface.
05. Let the leather dry before use.

## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

**What is included in Q²M LeatherSet Natural?**
LeatherCleaner Natural, LeatherCoat REDEFINED and application accessories.

**What type of leather is it intended for?**
Well maintained modern automotive leather.

**Does it change the look of the leather?**
No. It keeps a factory matte finish.

**How many cars can one set treat?**
Around two to three vehicles.

**Is it suitable for coated leather?**
Yes. It is safe for already protected surfaces.

## Recommended Pairing

- Q²M LEATHERCLEANER NATURAL (500 ML / 1000 ML) - Light, daily leather cleaner for well maintained leather.
- Q²M LEATHERBRUSH - A fully natural, safe leather brush with an ergonomically designed handle.
- Q²M BALDWIPE EVO (40x40 cm) - Equally effective during cleaning, polishing, or maintaining a vehicle.
- Q² LEATHERSHIELD EVO (50 ML / 100 ML) - Advanced leather protection.
- Q²M LEATHERCLEANER STRONG (500 ML / 1000 ML) - Strong, effective and safe leather cleaner.
- Q²M LEATHERSET STRONG - Complete leather maintenance set for used and dirty leather.

sources.cleaned_content:
# GYEON Q²M Leather Set Natural

Regular price: $50.00 CAD
Brand: Gyeon
Barcode: 8809973750385

![Product image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/GYEON-Q2M-Leather-Set-Natural.webp?v=1719463292&width=1800)

## Leather Protection Kit

Q²M Leather Set Mild is the comprehensive solution that includes Q²M LeatherCleaner Mild, a potent pre-coating leather cleaner, and Q² LeatherCoat, creating the perfect combination for leather maintenance and protection. Q²M Leather Mild effectively removes dirt and oil residue, providing optimal preparation for coating. Q² LeatherCoat ensures a durable matte clean surface, facilitating easier future maintenance against contamination.

BOX CONTAINS: Q²M LeatherCleaner Mild 200ml / Q² LeatherCoat 120ml / Q²M LeatherBrush / Q²M MF Applicator / Microfiber

![Product image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-set-mild-1.jpg?v=1702512886&width=1080)
![Product image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-set-mild_2aa8d9c8-5feb-4d36-a320-027b2f48a2b7.jpg?v=1702512886&width=1080)
![Product image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-set-mild-banner-2.jpg?v=1702512886&width=2400)

## Mild for maintenance

Q²M LeatherCleaner Mild stands as the ultimate solution for cleaning and preparing leather upholstery for the application of a quartz coating. Free from softening additives and residue, it ensures no interference with the quality of the coating. Q²M LeatherCleaner provides a fully matte finish and is suitable for all modern types of leather.

## GYEON Leather Set Natural

### Superb maintenance products for outstanding detailing performance

Q²M LeatherSet Natural is the complete solution for your leather maintenance. Combining Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural, a safe yet powerful pre-coating cleaner and Q² LeatherCoat Redefined, it becomes the ideal leather maintenance & protection solution.

BOX CONTAINS: Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural 200ml / Q² LeatherCoat Redefined 120ml / Q²M ScrubPad EVO / Q²M MF Applicator / Microfibre

### BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

Don't be afraid to use water along with the Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural foam. This will help you distribute the product and create more foam. The attached Q²M ScrubPad will agitate the cleaner and remove dirt from the material's structure. TIP: Always use multiple microfibre towels. It's worth wiping the leather with a damp towel after cleaning.

CONSUMPTION: 1set / 2-3 cars

### ALL IN ONE BOX

This full set comes with the brand new Q²M ScrubPad EVO & Q²M MF Applicator as well as a microfibre towel. The new Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural foam dispenser allows more effective and easier application out of the box. Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural ensures the removal of light dirt, oily residue and provides best preparation for coating. Q²M LeatherCoat Redefined ensures a long-lasting protective effect and makes future maintenance easier.

![Product image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-set-mild-banner.jpg?v=1702512886&width=2400)

### GENTLE AND EFFECTIVE

Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural is the perfect solution for daily maintenance and pre-coating preparation of leather upholstery. It does not contain any softening additives and does not leave any residue that could potentially interfere with a quality coating. Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural leaves a fully matte finish and is suitable for all modern types of leather. It might also be used on coated leather, not removing the coating and gently cleansing the surface.

## FAQ

**What's the difference between GYEON Leather Shield and Leather Coat?**
Leather Shield is a full-on leather ceramic coating, whereas Leather Coat is a water-based protection spray that's easy to use and can be used to maintain and top up Leather Shield.

**Is it shiny?**
No, both Cleaner and Leather Coat will give you a factory OEM matte finish.

**How long does it last?**
Leather Coat will last round 3 months per coat.

**Does it work on dashboards?**
Yes, it does. Not limited to leather or soft-touch material, Leather Coat & Cleaner can be used to coat plastics and vinyl as well.

**What's the difference between Mild and Strong?**
Mild is excellent for maintenance, while Strong can effectively remove leather protection products for a full strip and deep clean.

NOTE: This page was scraped for SKU Q2M-LSN200M (LeatherSet Natural) but the URL actually points to the OdorRemover Pads product. The content below is for Q²M OdorRemover Pads, NOT LeatherSet Natural.

# GYEON - Q²M OdorRemover Pads - 4 Pack

Product Code: GYMORP0000004
Price: £20.00 (Ex VAT: £16.67)
Brand: GYEON
Stock: 6 In Stock

## Description

Gyeon Q2M Odor Remover Pads utilise unique technology to encapsulate unpleasant smells and remove them completely from your interior, and the pads will aid in odor removal for many months.

Q2M Odor Remover Pads won't just mask unpleasant smells like a lot of air fresheners do. Utilising active particles of Gyeon Q2M Odor Remover, it encapsulates and eliminates them whilst being completely safe, making them especially perfect for vehicles carrying children or pets.

With the Purify line, anti-bacterial growth and bio-hazard nuisances can be controlled effectively, without any negative impact on your health and surroundings, thanks to its 100% natural ingredients formulation. Unique technology used for the first time in the automotive industry brings a new standard in anti-bacterial surface protection and creates an entirely new product group which can extend the portfolio of detailing studios or car washes.

- Removes unpleasant smells
- Water-based formula
- Long term effect

### Using Gyeon Q2 OdorRemover Pads

Simply place one pad under the seat or in any other place of choice. Do NOT place the pad under the drivers seat or anywhere where it may move and obstruct the drivers pedals.

sources.cleaned_content:
# GYEON Q²M Leather Set Natural

Brand: Gyeon
Price: £35.00
Availability: Only 9 left!

![Product image](//www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-q2m-leather-set-natural_1240x1068.jpg?v=1727943004)

## We Say

Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural is Gyeons latest mild leather cleanser suitable for all types of modern automotive leather including delicate nappa and semi-aniline upholstery. Whilst it doesn't pack as much "punch" as the Q2M Leather Cleaner Strong, it is more versatile, being able to be used on all types of modern leather, so would make for a perfect regular use cleanser.

## Key Features

- Agitation Required: Yes (See how to use)
- Cleaning Strength: 5/10 (Compared to others)
- Dilutable: No (Ready to use)

## Description

Gyeon Q2M Leather Set Natural is the complete solution for keeping on top of your leather. Combining Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural with Q2 Leather Coat Redefined, making this kit perfect for cleaning, protecting, and maintaining your leather.

Everything you need is in this set, as well as the cleaner and protector mentioned above, you get the Q2M Scrub Pad EVO to give the leather surfaces a deep clean, the Q2M MF Applicator for applying the Leather Coat and microfibre towel to wipe it all down.

Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural gently removes light dirt, oily residues and provides the best preparation for coating. It contains no softening additives and does not leave any residue that could potentially interfere with coatings. It leaves a natural looks, matte finish and is suitable for all types of modern leather. Gyeon Q2 Leather Coat ensures a long-lasting protective effect and makes future maintenance easier.

## Specification

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Agitation Required | Yes |
| Chemical Basis | Detergent Based |
| Cleaning Strength | 5 |
| Dilutable | No |
| Maximum Dwell Time | Five Minutes |
| Suitable For | Leather (All Types) |

## How To Use

Ensure the leather is clear and free of loose debris before cleaning. Apply a small amount of Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural onto the Q2M Scrub Pad and proceed to gently clean the leather, working on a small area at a time. Once worked in, wipe away residue with a clean microfibre towel. Once all leather is clean, proceed to protect with Q2 Leather Coat. Spray Leather Coat onto the supplied microfibre applicator and work into the leather, ensuring an even coverage. Let it dry for 15 minutes and then check the finish. If needed repeat the application. Allow a few hours before driving the vehicle.

# Gyeon Q2M Leather Set Natural

Brand: Gyeon
Price: £29.13
Stock: In stock
Pickup available at Newcastle, usually ready in 2 hours.

![Product image](//www.mycarcleaning.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/set-leather-cleaner-natural-1500.jpg?v=1749258989&width=1500)

## Q²M LEATHERCLEANER NATURAL

Mild leather cleaner dedicated for semi-aniline and nappa leather.

Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural is a safe, ph-neutral cleaner for all types of modern automotive leather. We designed it especially for luxury and sports cars' delicate nappa and semi-aniline upholstery. Of course, it is also suitable for any other type of modern leather upholstery. It is the ultimate leather preparation product for use before a coating application, developed along with Gyeon's high-end Q² LeatherShield EVO & Q² LeatherCoat redefined. It removes light dirt, oily residue and even light discolouration. Unlike most leather cleaners, the formula does not include softening or preserving additives, leaving a surface ready for coating.

### Gentle clean for any type of leather

Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural is the perfect solution for daily maintenance and pre-coating preparation of leather upholstery. It does not contain any softening additives and does not leave any residue that could potentially interfere with a quality ceramic coating. Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural leaves a fully matte finish and is suitable for all modern types of leather. It might also be used on coated leather, not removing the coating and gently cleansing the surface.

## Best practice and pro-tips from Yves Heylen

Always vacuum the upholstery first. Use Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural, along with water, to increase the foam and help distribute the cleaner. Use the Q²M ScrubPad EVO. Work in sections. TIP: Always remove dirt with a microfibre in a straight motion. Use at least 3 towels: for the initial wipe, a damp one to remove suds and another one to dry the surface.

Consumption: 100ml/car

Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural is the perfect solution for daily maintenance and pre-coating preparation of leather upholstery. Q²M LeatherCleaner Natural leaves a fully matte finish and is suitable for all modern types of leather.
